name: ckm_jarlskog
app_r_precision_str: literal φ⁻²² = 2.525×10⁻⁵ → -19.1% vs PDG (4.6σ); manuscript-stated value 3.19×10⁻⁵ would give +2.2% (0.5σ); it differs from the literal formula value by 26.3%

extra.candidate_ansatz_status: The literal φ⁻²² candidate ansatz catalogued under O.7 evaluates to 2.525×10⁻⁵, 19% (4.6σ) below the PDG value 3.12×10⁻⁵. A Wolfenstein-form alternative A²λ⁶η ≈ 3.24×10⁻⁵ sits closer to PDG (+5%) but is not a φ-power form. The Jarlskog invariant is held under OPEN RESEARCH (O.7) with no current Tier 2 GCT prediction; the eEDM derivation in Ch09 §9.6.3 is explicitly decoupled via the J-independent Tier 2 bounded form.
